name: Boss says don't report forklift injury or no more hours is that allowed?

mainEntity.name: Boss says don't report forklift injury or no more hours is that allowed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal; report and document threats for retaliation claim.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, illegal coercion; report anyway for protected benefits.** Retaliation prohibited.[2] Key factors: Document threats, report to HR/Commission anonymously if needed. Workers' comp rights can't be waived.[3] Pursue retaliation claim separately.

description: Illegal; report and document threats for retaliation claim.[2]
